name: Five Layer Bars/hershey's
recipeInstructions:
Heat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit. Place butter in a 13x9x2-inch baking pan. Heat in oven until melted; remove pan from oven. Stir together crumbs, cocoa and sugar; sprinkle evenly over butter. Pour sweetened condensed milk evenly over crumb mixture. Sprinkle with chocolate chips and raisins. Sprinkle nuts on top; press down firmly. Bake 25 to 30 minutes or until lightly browned. Cool completely in pan on wire rack. Cover with foil; let stand at room temperature 6 to 8 hours. Cut into bars. About 36 bars.
Variation:
Golden Bars: Substitute 1 cup Reese's Peanut Butter Chips for chocolate chips. Sprinkle 1 cup golden raisins or chopped dried apricots over chips. Proceed as above.
